summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Replay Adaptive Effect feature for Philos Orientation app. All 8 test cases passed. The ReplayAdaptiveEffectSection correctly displays Hebrew RTL layout, boosted/penalized directions with visual bars, Hebrew insight texts, and score summary grid with proper highlighting.

issues: Console warning: polyline attribute points: Expected number - SVG polyline points use percentage strings instead of numeric values

critical_code_review_comments: All required data-testid attributes present: replay-adaptive-effect-section, boosted-item-{idx}, penalized-item-{idx}, adaptive-insight-{idx}, score-summary-{type}
Hebrew RTL layout correctly implemented with dir='rtl' attribute
applyReplayInsightsToScores() function correctly modifies adaptive scores based on replay patterns
Conditional rendering works correctly - section only displays when adjustments.boosted.length > 0 || adjustments.penalized.length > 0
Score summary grid shows all 5 value types with correct highlighting (emerald for boosted, red for penalized)
seed_data_creation: Created 4 decisions with replay paths: harm→contribution (x2), avoidance→recovery, avoidance→order
context_for_next_testing_agent: Replay Adaptive Effect feature fully tested. Component integrates with usePhilosState hook which fetches replay insights from /api/memory/replay-insights/{user_id} and applies adjustments via applyReplayInsightsToScores(). The section shows boosted directions (contribution, recovery, order) with positive values and penalized directions (harm, avoidance) with negative values. Hebrew insights are generated dynamically based on which paths were boosted/penalized.

frontend_tests.details: Section has dir='rtl' attribute for Hebrew RTL layout
Shows positive paths (תרומה/contribution, התאוששות/recovery, סדר/order) with boost values (+5, +3, +2)
Shows negative paths (נזק/harm, הימנעות/avoidance) with penalty values (-3, -4)
Displays: 'מסלולי תרומה קיבלו חיזוק בעקבות דפוסי הפעלה חוזרת.'
Displays: 'מסלולי הימנעות מקבלים כעת הפחתת משקל חזקה יותר.'
All 5 value scores displayed with correct highlighting (contribution, recovery, order, harm, avoidance)
Component only renders when adjustments.boosted.length > 0 || adjustments.penalized.length > 0
Section updates dynamically when new replay paths are selected

features_verified.boosted_directions: Green bars showing positive paths with boost values like +5, +3
features_verified.penalized_directions: Red bars showing negative paths with penalty values like -4, -3
features_verified.hebrew_insights: Two Hebrew insight texts generated based on boosted/penalized patterns
features_verified.score_summary_grid: 5-column grid showing all value scores with emerald highlighting for boosted and red for penalized
features_verified.conditional_rendering: Component hidden when no adjustments exist
features_verified.rtl_layout: Full Hebrew RTL support with dir='rtl' attribute
features_verified.adaptive_score_modification: applyReplayInsightsToScores() correctly boosts positive paths and penalizes negative paths based on replay exploration patterns
